title: Lo-Fi Late-Night Coding
summary: Focus-oriented 80 BPM lo-fi with synthwave touches  -  alert but never frantic.
prompt: A focus-oriented lo-fi beat at 80 BPM with subtle synthwave elements. Reverby electric piano arpeggios, warm analog synth pads in a minor key, soft trip-hop drum break, deep mellow sub-bass, occasional faint chimes. Late-night-coding vibe  -  alert but never frantic. No vocals, repetitive enough for deep focus.
